vocab.example: A well-organized workspace can catalyze productivity by minimizing the time spent looking for misplaced resources.
Studying in a cluttered room increases the cognitive load on the brain, making it harder to absorb complex theories.

vocab.meaning: có lợi/giúp ích cho sự tập trung
vocab.example: Soft instrumental music and neutral colors create an atmosphere that is highly conducive to concentration.

vocab.meaning: củng cố/nâng cao kết quả học tập
vocab.example: Providing students with access to quiet zones is a proven strategy to bolster academic performance.
The lighting of a library has a subliminal influence on our alertness and ability to stay awake during late-night sessions.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng sự phát triển trí tuệ
vocab.example: I believe an environment filled with books and stimulating art can foster intellectual growth in young learners.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt căng thẳng đầu óc
vocab.example: Incorporating indoor plants into a study area can help alleviate mental strain and reduce stress levels.

vocab.meaning: sự chú ý hoàn toàn/không bị phân tâm
vocab.example: A soundproof environment allows me to give my undivided attention to the lecture materials.

vocab.meaning: chức năng nhận thức tối ưu
vocab.example: Ergonomic furniture and proper ventilation are essential for maintaining optimal cognitive function throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: kích hoạt tư duy/tâm thế làm việc
vocab.example: Having a dedicated desk helps to trigger a work mindset the moment I sit down, separating leisure from labor.
